title: 🎉 Paper Accepted by ICML 2026
excerpt: Our paper "When Replanning Becomes the Bottleneck: Budgeted Replanning for Embodied Agents" has been accepted by The 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026).
excerptHtml: Our paper "When Replanning Becomes the Bottleneck: Budgeted Replanning for Embodied Agents" has been accepted by The 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026).
